allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\Work\\Self Portal\\infypos-backend"; $proc = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "src/server.js" -WorkingDirectory "e:\\Work\\Self Portal\\infypos-backend" -PassThru; Write-Host "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@infypos.com","password":"123456"}'\).data.token; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/warehouses" -Method Get -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)
